card_description: George Smith is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick analyzes the "Cabrillo" dream to conclude that the Xerox letter was a "fake" entrapment attempt (possibly by "The Man" or "Reds")."
